name: Smothered Round Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the roast with half of the salt and peppers, then dust with flour on all sides.
2. Heat oil in a Dutch oven or large heavy pot over medium-high heat. Add the steak and brown well on all sides.
3. Remove the meat and discard most of the oil, leaving about 1 teaspoon.
4. Add half the onions, bell peppers, celery, and remaining seasonings to the pot. Stir well.
5. Reduce heat to the lowest possible setting. Return the roast to the pot with the remaining vegetables and cover.
6. Cook until the meat is very tender, approximately 1 hour and 15 minutes.
7. Serve slices of meat over rice with gravy.
When using different meats, adjust cooking times based on tenderness as your guide. For enhanced flavor, consider larding with garlic slivers before smothering.
